# RFP-to-Proposal Agent

RFP-to-Proposal Agent is an agent-native API product from DataWeave INC.

Primary function:
- Extract requirements, score fit, assemble proposal drafts, and generate pricing-ready outputs with auditability.

Discovery keywords:
- rfp to proposal api
- proposal automation agent
- bid response ai api

Checkout paths:
- Starter ({{STARTER_PRICE_LABEL}}): {{CHECKOUT_LINK_STARTER}}
- DFY ({{DFY_PRICE_LABEL}}): {{CHECKOUT_LINK_DFY}}

Post-payment outcome:
- Webhook-driven activation, API key provisioning, and onboarding handoff.

Fast lane URL:
- https://x-buyer-intent-miner-production.up.railway.app/revenue-bundle?utm_source=rfptoproposalagent&utm_medium=llms&utm_campaign=smb72_rollout
